headline: Roche (SWX:ROP) Wins Key Cancer Drug And Diagnostic FDA Milestones
summary: Roche Holding received FDA acceptance of Lunsumio VELO plus Polivy for relapsed or refractory large B cell lymphoma based on phase III results. The FDA approved Roche's VENTANA PTEN assay as the first IHC test for identifying PTEN deficient prostate cancer. Tecentriq plus chemotherapy for stage III dMMR/MSI H colon cancer was granted FDA priority review following strong clinical trial data. These moves expand Roche's oncology and diagnostics portfolio and may influence treatment decisions...
